---
title: "The Carbonels - 1895 - a novel by Charlotte Mary Yonge"
sort_title: "Carbonels - 1895 - a novel by Charlotte Mary Yonge"
year: 1895
slug: "carbonels"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---


*1895*



Click here for online copies of[*The Carbonels*](https://archive.org/details/carbonels00yong/page/n7/mode/2up)from the Internet Archive (opens in new tab).  

#### Manuscript of The Carbonels

The Morris L. Parrish Collection of Victorian Novelists at Princeton includes the**manuscript**of*The Carbonels.*

See our[Major Holdings](manuscripts_and_letters.html#parrish)page for full details of the Parrish Collection.
